name: Half-Elf
summary: Children of two worlds. Versatile like humans, perceptive like elves.

traits.name: Adaptability
traits.summary: Bonus Skill Focus feat at 1st level.

traits.name: Elf Blood
traits.summary: Counts as both human and elf for race-based effects.

traits.name: Elven Immunities
traits.summary: Immune to magic sleep; +2 saves vs enchantments.

traits.name: Multitalented
traits.summary: Two favored classes; gain favored class bonus from either.
